indication: CYRAMZA is a human vascular endothelial growth factor receptor 2 (VEGFR2) antagonist indicated in combination with erlotinib, for first-line treatment of metastatic non-small cell lung cancer with epidermal growth factor receptor (EGFR) exon 19 deletions or exon 21 (L858R) mutations.
description: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration granted approval to ramucirumab in combination with erlotinib for the first-line treatment of patients with metastatic non-small cell lung cancer with epidermal growth factor receptor (EGFR) exon 19 deletions or exon 21 (L858R) mutations.

document.name: Cyramza (ramucirumab) [package insert]. FDA.
